code_dossier.name: PageUtils.java
code_dossier.description: A utility class for encapsulating pagination data, providing a unified pagination result wrapper that supports both manual pagination parameters and MyBatis-Plus IPage integration.

data.detailed_description:
PageUtils is a lightweight pagination utility class designed to standardize pagination response data across the application. It serves as a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for pagination results, encapsulating essential pagination metadata including total record count, page size, total pages, current page number, and the actual data list.

The class provides two construction approaches:
1. **Manual Construction**: Accepts raw pagination parameters (list, totalCount, pageSize, currPage) and automatically calculates the total page count using ceiling division.
2. **MyBatis-Plus Integration**: Accepts an IPage<?> object from MyBatis-Plus ORM framework and extracts all pagination information, providing seamless integration with the popular persistence layer.

The class implements Serializable interface with an explicit serialVersionUID, enabling safe serialization for distributed systems, caching scenarios, and session storage. Lombok annotations (@Getter, @Setter) are used to reduce boilerplate code for accessor methods.

This utility class acts as a standardized response container, ensuring consistent pagination data structure throughout the application's API responses and service layer communications.
responsibilities: Encapsulate pagination metadata (totalCount, pageSize, totalPage, currPage) into a unified data structure
Provide seamless integration with MyBatis-Plus IPage pagination results
Calculate total page count automatically based on total records and page size
Enable serialization support for distributed system compatibility and caching
Standardize pagination response format across the application

interfaces.name: PageUtils

parameters.name: list
parameters.description: The list of data records for current page

parameters.name: totalCount
parameters.description: Total number of records across all pages

interfaces.description: Constructs PageUtils with manual pagination parameters and calculates total pages

interfaces.description: Returns number of records per page (generated by Lombok @Getter)

interfaces.description: Returns the list of data records (generated by Lombok @Getter)
